name: docker-pycreds

metadata.name: docker-pycreds
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Python bindings for the docker credentials store API

documentation:
# docker-pycreds

[![CircleCI](https://circleci.com/gh/shin-/dockerpy-creds/tree/master.svg?style=svg)](https://circleci.com/gh/shin-/dockerpy-creds/tree/master)

Python bindings for the docker credentials store API

## Credentials store info

[Docker documentation page](https://docs.docker.com/engine/reference/commandline/login/#/credentials-store)

## Requirements

On top of the dependencies in `requirements.txt`, the `docker-credential`
executable for the platform must be installed on the user's system.

## API usage

```python

import dockerpycreds

store = dockerpycreds.Store('secretservice')
store.store(
    server='https://index.docker.io/v1/', username='johndoe',
    secret='hunter2'
)

print(store.list())

print(store.get('https://index.docker.io/v1/'))


store.erase('https://index.docker.io/v1/')
```

functions.name: dockerpycreds.utils.find_executable
documentation:
As distutils.spawn.find_executable, but on Windows, look up
every extension declared in PATHEXT instead of just `.exe`

functions.name: dockerpycreds.utils.create_environment_dict
documentation: Create and return a copy of os.environ with the specified overrides

methods.name: dockerpycreds.store.Store.__init__
documentation:
Create a store object that acts as an interface to
perform the basic operations for storing, retrieving
and erasing credentials using `program`.

methods.name: dockerpycreds.store.Store.get
documentation:
Retrieve credentials for `server`. If no credentials are found,
a `StoreError` will be raised.

methods.name: dockerpycreds.store.Store.store
documentation:
Store credentials for `server`. Raises a `StoreError` if an error
occurs.

methods.name: dockerpycreds.store.Store.erase
documentation:
Erase credentials for `server`. Raises a `StoreError` if an error
occurs.

methods.name: dockerpycreds.store.Store.list
documentation: List stored credentials. Requires v0.4.0+ of the helper.
